name: Neurological Associates
message: Neuro Associates, located in Kirkland, Washington, is a neurology clinic established in 1974 with a team of four highly experienced neurologists. The clinic offers comprehensive neurological services, including advanced MRI diagnostics, while prioritizing personalized and compassionate patient care. They emphasize accessibility and cost-effectiveness, not charging facility fees, and focus on one-on-one consultations between patients and their physicians. Neuro Associates aims to support patients with a wide range of neurological conditions through tailored treatment plans and a commitment to improving their quality of life.
